title: Fridge Poetry Source
description: Each word can only be used as many times as it appears in these lines.
lines: build with care and ship with confidence
music and code and coffee at midnight
soft focus loud ideas clear execution
make it simple make it quick make it kind
debugging is detective work with rhythm
ship the version then improve the version
from sketch to prototype to production
good software good sound good people
ask better questions write better tests
open source open doors open minds
design for humans optimize for flow
build for today and for tomorrow
network with curiosity lead with value
keep momentum keep craft keep joy
